items.title: AbbVie bets on Chinese biopharma’s pain pipeline in $745m bid
items.summary: AbbVie's deal with Haisco comes as many pharma companies look to restock their pipelines amid looming global patent expiries.

items.title: Telix and Regeneron sign $4.3bn deal to co-develop radiopharmaceutical therapies
items.summary: Telix and Regeneron have entered a partnership for the development and commercialisation of new radiopharmaceutical therapies.

items.title: FDA issues complete response letter to Replimune’s RP1 for melanoma
items.summary: The FDA has issued a complete response letter to Replimune’s biologics license application concerning the RP1 therapy.

items.title: BMS and Oxford BioTherapeutics join forces in TCE discovery pact
items.summary: OBT's pact with BMS meshes with the former's hybrid partnership-pipeline strategy, which prioritises collaboration to maximise its impact.

items.title: Emerging therapies bring hope for frail HNSCC patients unfit for standard treatment
items.summary: Standard of care HNSCC regimens with curative intent demand surgery, radiation, and chemotherapy - treatments that many patients cannot tolerate.
